meta.disclaimer: Deadlines and eligibility change yearly. Always verify on the official URL before applying. This database is curated for a non-HK-PR Kazakh BME undergrad at HKU.

opportunities.notes: No residency restriction. Strongest early-year prestige package.
opportunities.creative_angle: Pitch BME/medtech project with UK host in summer 1, then health-NGO LiA abroad in summer 2 — two funded international summers from one application.
opportunities.name: Laidlaw Undergraduate Research & Leadership Programme
opportunities.what_you_get: 6-week research summer (HK/UK/Switzerland) + Leadership-in-Action travel up to HK$15k + weekly stipend HK$2–5k
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Full-time UG Y1–Y2 (or graduate in/after 2027–28); CGPA ~3.0+; research proposal + HKU supervisor letter; not visiting students

opportunities.notes: Must apply through HKU IAO first. Citizenship irrelevant.
opportunities.creative_angle: Filter Mitacs projects for biomedical devices / AI-health / biomaterials.
opportunities.name: Mitacs Globalink Research Internship (via HKU)
opportunities.what_you_get: ~CAD 9,000 for airfare, housing, living; 12-week Canadian research internship
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Non-final-year UG; CGPA ≥3.3; ≥2 semesters at HKU; apply via IAO nomination first. No citizenship requirement.

opportunities.notes: Apply only to Asia region (not US/Europe) as HKU student. Interest in PhD expected.
opportunities.creative_angle: Apply to multiple Asia hosts in one cycle.
opportunities.name: Amgen Scholars Asia
opportunities.what_you_get: Fully funded 8–10 week life-science/biotech research + Asia Symposium (travel/housing covered)
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Enrolled at a university in Asia (HKU qualifies). Citizenship irrelevant. Not graduating before/during programme; resume undergrad after.

opportunities.notes: Excellent BME fit (biomaterials, biomechanics, medtech).
opportunities.creative_angle: Target School of Engineering / Life Sciences labs aligned to devices.
opportunities.name: EPFL Excellence in Engineering (E3)
opportunities.what_you_get: CHF 1,800/month + travel refund; 8–12 weeks in bioengineering/biomaterials labs
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Open worldwide; ≥2 years Bachelor completed at application; stay enrolled

opportunities.notes: Higher GPA bar than E3.
opportunities.creative_angle: Pair with Swiss visa planning early.
opportunities.name: EPFL Life Sciences Summer Research Program
opportunities.what_you_get: Stipend + most travel; 8 weeks wet-lab / life-science research
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Strong GPA (~3.75/4.0); ≥2 years undergrad; English

opportunities.notes: Longer placements — plan around HKU semester.
opportunities.creative_angle: Great for computational + experimental BME labs at OIST.
opportunities.name: OIST Research Internship (Japan)
opportunities.what_you_get: Round-trip airfare + housing + ¥2,400/working day; 3–6 months
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Final 2 years of Bachelor OK; English; ¥3,000 application fee

opportunities.notes: Year-round — flexible vs fixed summer deadlines.
opportunities.creative_angle: Use for winter/spring if summer slots fill elsewhere.
opportunities.name: KAUST Visiting Student Research Program
opportunities.what_you_get: Monthly stipend + housing + airfare; research in STEM labs
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Undergrad/grad STEM; year-round applications; competitive

opportunities.notes: Science faculty focus; frame BME as biophysics/materials.
opportunities.name: UTRIP – University of Tokyo Science Summer Research
opportunities.what_you_get: Scholarship track: housing + stipend/allowance (airfare often covered)
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Enrolled outside Japan; return to undergrad after; science-leaning BME OK

opportunities.notes: Stretch for pure wet-lab BME; strong for imaging/instrumentation/computing BME.
opportunities.creative_angle: Pitch medical imaging / detector / data analysis angle.
opportunities.name: CERN Summer Student Programme
opportunities.what_you_get: Daily allowance (~CHF 90+) + possible travel; ~8–13 weeks
opportunities.eligibility_summary: ≥6 semesters physics/eng/CS/math; BME OK if transcript is technical enough

opportunities.notes: Pipeline toward SINGA PhD later.
opportunities.creative_angle: Use as Singapore foothold before SINGA.
opportunities.name: A*STAR SIPGA (Singapore)
opportunities.what_you_get: Research attachment stipend; Singapore biomedical labs
opportunities.eligibility_summary: International undergrads; competitive; English

opportunities.name: Weizmann Kupcinet-Getz International Summer School
opportunities.what_you_get: Stipend + housing; research in Israel
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Outstanding undergrads in sciences; highly competitive

opportunities.notes: Confirm international + visa support each year.
opportunities.name: Caltech SURF
opportunities.what_you_get: Stipend for summer research; international students sometimes accepted with funding nuances
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Verify international eligibility yearly; very competitive

opportunities.notes: Good if BME leans neural eng / neurotech.
opportunities.name: RIKEN CBS Summer Program
opportunities.what_you_get: Brain science summer research in Japan
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Undergrad/grad in related fields; English

opportunities.notes: KEY door for internationals. Stack onto Mingde, WZQ, China Vision trips.
opportunities.creative_angle: Join any ≥3-day HKU mainland trip and claim MES once.
opportunities.name: Non-means-tested Mainland Experience Scheme (MES)
opportunities.funder: HKSAR EDB via HKU China Vision
opportunities.what_you_get: Reimbursement once per UG for Mainland HKU-organised activities (≥3 days)
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Local OR non-local full-time UG; HKU-organised activity; once only; claim within 30 days

opportunities.notes: Best general cash top-up for non-locals locked out of SSE.
opportunities.creative_angle: Pair with Mitacs residual costs or summer school.
opportunities.name: HKSAR Reaching Out Award (ROA)
opportunities.what_you_get: One-off HK$10,000 for outbound learning (exchange, internship, conference, competition)
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Full-time UGC UG/PG; CGPA ≥3.20; local AND non-local; once only

opportunities.notes: Check BME course mapping early.
opportunities.creative_angle: Target TUM/DTU/UIUC for medtech tracks.
opportunities.name: Faculty of Engineering Exchange Programme
opportunities.what_you_get: Tuition-waiver semester at engineering partners + auto Scholarship for Semester Exchange (HK$4–14k)
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Non-final-year BEng/BME; preferably CGPA 3.0+; English proof

opportunities.notes: Only one offer from Faculty OR HKUWW.
opportunities.creative_angle: Use for destinations not on Engg faculty list.
opportunities.name: HKU Worldwide Student Exchange (HKUWW)
opportunities.what_you_get: 1–2 semester study at partner unis; pay HKU tuition; scholarships available
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Non-final-year full-time UG; CGPA/English per host

opportunities.notes: You pay host fees first; assistance not full cover.
opportunities.creative_angle: Get new BME programmes recognized by emailing goabroad@hku.hk.
opportunities.name: IAO Scholarships for Short-term Study Abroad (GSP)
opportunities.what_you_get: Up to HK$4,000–14,000 by zone after ≥2-week recognized short-term programme
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Full-time UG; CGPA ≥2.0; register via GSP after host admission

opportunities.notes: Still pay most travel yourself.
opportunities.creative_angle: Apply as student coordinator for extra funding; attach to healthtech host.
opportunities.name: HKU–Common Purpose Leadership Development Programme
opportunities.what_you_get: HK$5,000 sponsorship; ~3-week organisational attachment in Asia city
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Primarily UG any discipline/year; interview; coordinator roles get extra

opportunities.notes: Pair with MES reimbursement.
opportunities.creative_angle: Near-free Mainland immersion + MES + Horizons Experience Award video.
opportunities.name: Horizons Project Mingde
opportunities.what_you_get: Heavily subsidised build-and-serve trips; student pays ~20% (~RMB 300–500)
opportunities.eligibility_summary: All Faculties welcome; year-round apps

opportunities.notes: Matches peer destinations (Gansu). Learn Mandarin first.
opportunities.creative_angle: Credit-bearing Gansu route + MES + Experience Award video.
opportunities.name: HKU Wu Zhi Qiao (Bridge to China) Programme
opportunities.what_you_get: 6-credit service-learning; low fee ~HK$3,500 + travel; Gansu/Dunhuang routes
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Full-time UG; not usually final year; ~20 quota; interview; beginner Mandarin expected

opportunities.notes: Note spelling: Tin Ka Ping (not Ting). Education Faculty EL Grant is Education-only.
opportunities.creative_angle: Ask Horizons for English-friendlier cohorts while learning Mandarin.
opportunities.name: TKP–Horizons Chinese Culture Immersion & Internship
opportunities.what_you_get: Mainland cultural immersion and/or internship
opportunities.eligibility_summary: HKU undergraduates; details per cohort

opportunities.notes: Does not fund new travel — monetises completed experience.
opportunities.creative_angle: Film every trip; win cash that seeds the next journey.
opportunities.name: HKU Horizons Experience Award
opportunities.what_you_get: Top prize HK$10,000; runners-up HK$5,000 for ≤3-min reflective video
opportunities.eligibility_summary: UG who completed Mainland/international learning; individual or group

opportunities.notes: Place of Origin usually not specified.
opportunities.creative_angle: Use for self-arranged conference or short research visit.
opportunities.name: Rayson Huang Memorial Student Enrichment Award
opportunities.what_you_get: HK$5,000–10,000 toward planned Mainland/international learning
opportunities.eligibility_summary: UG planning ML/INT activity; CGPA ~3.0+; cannot hold other Uni enrichment for same activity

opportunities.notes: One award per activity — don't double-claim.
opportunities.name: Tam Wun Tsun HKU Horizons Student Enrichment Award
opportunities.funder: Tam Yik Fong Charitable Foundation / Horizons
opportunities.what_you_get: HK$5,000–10,000 toward planned ML/INT activity
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Same call as Rayson Huang

opportunities.notes: Origin Not specified — promising for non-locals.
opportunities.creative_angle: Target NUS/NTU biomed exchange + Sau Ching + IAO scholarship.
opportunities.name: Sau Ching Foundation Scholarship for Student Exchange
opportunities.what_you_get: HK$20,000 for exchange with South/Southeast Asia partners
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Any year UG; academic merit; ~4 outgoing awards/year

opportunities.notes: Funding not automatic — stack ROA / short-term scholarship / MES.
opportunities.creative_angle: Fulfil BMED3020 abroad via CGCSS + claim ROA.
opportunities.name: CEDARS Global Career Springboard Scheme
opportunities.what_you_get: Access to international internships in 50+ locations; possible out-of-class credit
opportunities.eligibility_summary: HKU students with CGCSS account; openings vary

opportunities.notes: Confirm Engg award amounts with Faculty.
opportunities.creative_angle: Negotiate overseas BME lab as essential URFP deliverable.
opportunities.name: Undergraduate Research Fellowship Programme (URFP)
opportunities.what_you_get: Supervised research; possible internship award (often up to ~HK$40k overseas)
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Top ~10% OR CGPA ≥3.50; usually final year

opportunities.notes: Not a travel programme — unlocks Laidlaw/Mitacs supervisor letters.
opportunities.creative_angle: Generate preliminary data for Laidlaw overseas proposal.
opportunities.name: EUREKA Undergraduate Research Programme
opportunities.what_you_get: Research credits under mentor (mostly on-campus) — pipeline to travel awards
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Non-final year; ≥2 semesters; CGPA ≥2.70

opportunities.notes: Still pay housing/living (~HK$100k+). Check Engg credit mapping.
opportunities.creative_angle: Frame as regional health-systems comparative study.
opportunities.name: 3 Campus East Asia (Keio–Yonsei–HKU)
opportunities.what_you_get: 1-year multi-campus immersion Tokyo→Seoul→HKU
opportunities.eligibility_summary: ≥1 year at HKU; CGPA 3.0+; ~5 HKU places

opportunities.notes: Hidden funding — watch Engg/BME emails.
opportunities.creative_angle: Ask professors running Mainland collaborations if trips are China-10k funded.
opportunities.name: HKU China 10,000 Exchange Programme Fund
opportunities.what_you_get: Faculty/unit-funded Mainland programmes (students ride on staff grants)
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Join Faculty/unit programmes funded under the scheme

opportunities.notes: Confirm residency wording each call.
opportunities.creative_angle: Use for IEEE EMBS conference travel.
opportunities.name: Philip K H Wong Foundation Student Enrichment Scholarships
opportunities.what_you_get: HK$10,000–50,000 for exchange, internships, service, conferences
opportunities.eligibility_summary: UG enrichment; merit; financial need may be considered

opportunities.notes: Confirm non-local eligibility each round.
opportunities.name: YC Cheng Engineering Scholarship
opportunities.what_you_get: HK$10,000–30,000 for BEng overseas learning
opportunities.eligibility_summary: BEng students; merit + financial need; Faculty-approved activity

opportunities.notes: NOT a 'travel ambassador' job — language pathway. Closest match to peer's Spain story.
opportunities.creative_angle: Enrol SPAN1001→2002 over 2–3 semesters, then compete for Consulate prize.
opportunities.name: Consulate General of Spain Prize (HKU Spanish Programme)
opportunities.funder: Consulate General of Spain in Hong Kong
opportunities.what_you_get: Travel to Spain for summer intensive Spanish course (after SPAN2002)
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Students in HKU Spanish Programme; typically after SPAN2002

opportunities.notes: HARD TRAP. Often confused with 'Hang Seng Scholars'.
opportunities.creative_angle: N/A unless you hold HKPR.
opportunities.name: HSBC Global Scholarship
opportunities.what_you_get: Up to HK$300,000 for 1 year abroad (tuition, airfare, room & board)
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Non-final UG; HKSAR permanent resident with right of abode; CGPA ~3.7+

opportunities.notes: Major residency trap. Use MES + ROA instead.
opportunities.name: EDB Subsidy on Exchange (SSE / SSEBR)
opportunities.what_you_get: Substantial destination+duration subsidies for overseas activities
opportunities.eligibility_summary: LOCAL students only

opportunities.notes: Great thematic fit but HKPR required.
opportunities.name: Innovation and Technology Scholarship
opportunities.what_you_get: Up to HK$150,000 for Overseas/Mainland attachments + mentorship
opportunities.eligibility_summary: HK Permanent Resident; non-final UG; CGPA ≥3.0; Life & Health Technology area fits BME

opportunities.notes: Non-locals: do GBA internship anyway and claim MES.
opportunities.name: UGC GBA Internship Subsidy (HK$6,000)
opportunities.what_you_get: HK$6,000 for ≥4-week GBA internship
opportunities.eligibility_summary: LOCAL full-time UG only

opportunities.name: CEDARS Student Travel Funds / Travel Loan
opportunities.what_you_get: Bursary/loan HK$3,000–30,000 for overseas enrichment
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Full-time LOCAL students

opportunities.notes: Enrollment trap — HKU students cannot apply. Use DAAD database as KZ citizen for other schemes.
opportunities.creative_angle: Browse DAAD database filtered by Kazakhstan citizenship for other German options.
opportunities.name: DAAD RISE Germany
opportunities.what_you_get: Stipend for research internship in Germany
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Only students at US/Canada/UK/Ireland universities

opportunities.notes: Ironic: destinations include Kazakhstan but you need HKID.
opportunities.name: HYAB United Nations Volunteer Internship
opportunities.what_you_get: Fully funded ~6-month UN placement: travel + living allowance + insurance
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Age 18–30; holder of valid HK Permanent Identity Card / HKID

opportunities.notes: Verify current Official Rules — prize packages evolve. Win = free flight pattern.
opportunities.creative_angle: BME + Azure AI for med-device decision support.
opportunities.name: Microsoft Imagine Cup
opportunities.what_you_get: Regional finals travel historically covered for advancing teams; cash + Azure
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Student teams 16+; AI-powered solutions

opportunities.notes: Only finalists travel — not apply-and-fly.
opportunities.creative_angle: Wearable/health BME apps with strong narrative.
opportunities.name: Red Bull Basement
opportunities.what_you_get: World Final flights typically covered for selected finalists; winner ~$100k equity-free
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Young innovators / students / first-time founders

opportunities.notes: Travel is byproduct of advancing.
opportunities.creative_angle: Low-cost diagnostics for Central Asia underserved markets.
opportunities.name: Hult Prize
opportunities.what_you_get: Top teams invited to Global Accelerator (UK); path to $1M seed; travel often team/uni-funded
opportunities.eligibility_summary: University student teams; SDG for-profit startups

opportunities.notes: Fundraising is the travel grant.
opportunities.creative_angle: Own the sponsor deck — fundraising leads often get funded tickets first.
opportunities.name: iGEM Grand Jamboree
opportunities.what_you_get: In-person jamboree; travel if team funds it
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Join official iGEM team

opportunities.notes: Highest-probability funded STEM travel once you have research data.
opportunities.creative_angle: One HKU project → EMBC abstract → travel grant ≈ funded international trip.
opportunities.name: IEEE EMBS / EMBC Student Travel Grants
opportunities.what_you_get: Typically ~USD 2,000 reimbursement; present accepted paper
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Active EMBS student member; accepted paper; present in person

opportunities.notes: Kazakhstan citizenship can be an asset. Apply to multiple scholarships.
opportunities.creative_angle: Pitch 'Kazakh student in HK bridging Belt-and-Road health equity'.
opportunities.name: One Young World Summit Scholarships
opportunities.what_you_get: Full scholarships often include flights + hotel + catering
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Usually 18–30/35; demonstrated impact; underrepresented countries priority

opportunities.next_deadline_hint: Contact KZ youth orgs / Consulate HK
opportunities.notes: Studying in HK does not block Kazakh national nomination.
opportunities.creative_angle: Ask Consulate General HK to nominate you as overseas student delegate.
opportunities.name: SCO Youth Campus / Youth Development Forum
opportunities.what_you_get: Hosted programme in China; often near-free for national delegates
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Youth from SCO member states including Kazakhstan; nomination via national youth orgs / embassy

opportunities.notes: Verify university-age eligibility — some editions skew younger.
opportunities.creative_angle: If age-capped, pivot to Otandastar Scholars Forum.
opportunities.name: Otandastar «Jas Qazaq» Ethno-Camp
opportunities.what_you_get: Camp in Burabai; programme covered; international airfare varies by year
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Ethnic Kazakh youth abroad; competition selection

opportunities.notes: Build a poster/publication first.
opportunities.creative_angle: Position as HKU BME → Kazakhstan medtech transfer talent.
opportunities.name: Otandastar Scholars Forum (NU)
opportunities.what_you_get: Invitation to Astana; travel support case-by-case
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Kazakh scholars/students abroad with STEM profile

opportunities.notes: CRITICAL: Do not apply as 'HK student'. Kazakh nationality is the opening.
opportunities.creative_angle: Summer 2-month HES between HKU years = cheap Mandarin + network.
opportunities.name: Taiwan Huayu Enrichment Scholarship (HES)
opportunities.what_you_get: ~NT$28,000/month stipend; tuition often separate; flights DIY
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Foreign nationals ≥18; Mainland/HK/Macao students excluded — apply as Kazakh via appropriate TECO

opportunities.notes: Cannot apply directly to JASSO.
opportunities.creative_angle: Target Tokyo Tech / Tohoku / Osaka biomedical partners.
opportunities.name: JASSO Student Exchange Support Program
opportunities.what_you_get: ¥80,000/month while on Japan exchange; tuition usually waived via agreement
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Must be nominated via HKU–Japan exchange; GPA ≥2.30/3.00 JASSO scale

opportunities.year_of_study: Degree after HS/bachelor; exchange while enrolled
opportunities.notes: A move, not a short trip — language year is immersive travel.
opportunities.creative_angle: GKS Exchange via HKU partner if available = shorter commitment.
opportunities.name: Global Korea Scholarship (GKS)
opportunities.what_you_get: Degree: airfare + language year + tuition + stipend; Exchange track also exists
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Kazakhstan usually invited; GPA ≥80%; age caps for undergrad

opportunities.notes: Join SGAC months before applying.
opportunities.creative_angle: 'Biomedical engineering for crew health' + Central Asia representation.
opportunities.name: Space Generation Advisory Council Scholarships
opportunities.what_you_get: Economy airfare, lodging, visa, registration for SGC/IAC
opportunities.eligibility_summary: SGAC members 18–35; active volunteers prioritized

opportunities.notes: Read each vacancy's financial support line.
opportunities.creative_angle: Target WPRO Manila (closer) + Kazakh LMIC narrative.
opportunities.name: WHO Internship Programme
opportunities.what_you_get: Internship; insurance; possible living allowance; travel may be covered for some middle-income nationals
opportunities.eligibility_summary: ≥20; 3 years uni completed; WHO Member State passport

opportunities.notes: Travel is secondary; network unlocks funded invites later.
opportunities.creative_angle: Propose GBA health-tech inclusion project as portfolio.
opportunities.name: WEF Global Shapers — Hong Kong Hub
opportunities.what_you_get: Hub membership; occasional sponsored travel to regional/global events
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Typically under ~27–30; living in/near hub; proven initiatives

opportunities.notes: Join working groups BEFORE funded calls open.
opportunities.creative_angle: Chemicals/waste or health tracks; Kazakhstan as transition economy voice.
opportunities.name: UN Major Group for Children and Youth — Funded Nominations
opportunities.what_you_get: When funded: return airfare + DSA
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Youth ≤35; active in constituency; Global South priority often

opportunities.notes: Apply via Kazakhstan track if open.
opportunities.creative_angle: Dual-pitch: Kazakh national Seeds + HKU GBA visits.
opportunities.name: Huawei Seeds for the Future
opportunities.what_you_get: Study trip historically to Beijing/Shenzhen fully covered for national cohort
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Usually citizens of country of application; final-year ICT-related; GPA ~3.0+

opportunities.notes: From HK this is highest ROI 'travel' — cross-border, not flights.
opportunities.creative_angle: Warm-up for longer Mainland research internships.
opportunities.name: Shenzhen University Summer in Liyuan / International Youth Study
opportunities.what_you_get: Tuition/accommodation/activities covered on scholarship; airfare/meals not
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Age 18–30; international youth

opportunities.notes: Visa-free for Kazakh citizens.
opportunities.creative_angle: Combine with diaspora networking while 'home'.
opportunities.name: Nazarbayev University ISSAI Summer Research Program
opportunities.what_you_get: Grant track: free programme + campus housing; travel not covered
opportunities.eligibility_summary: HS/uni students worldwide; assessment test for grants

opportunities.notes: Check whether to apply via HK or Kazakhstan committee.
opportunities.name: IAESTE Internships
opportunities.what_you_get: Paid technical internships abroad; employer stipend; placement fee may apply
opportunities.eligibility_summary: STEM students via national IAESTE committee

opportunities.notes: Remote first; travel secondary.
opportunities.creative_angle: Computational BME / medical imaging OSS orgs.
opportunities.name: Google Summer of Code
opportunities.what_you_get: Stipend for open-source work (remote); sometimes conference travel opportunities
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Student/newcomer developer; accepted project proposal

opportunities.notes: RISE blocked from HK — database may still surface University Summer Courses etc.
opportunities.creative_angle: Apply as KZ citizen for German summer courses + MPI cold-email.
opportunities.name: DAAD Scholarship Database (Kazakhstan filter)
opportunities.what_you_get: Country-filtered German scholarships, courses, research grants
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Filter citizenship = Kazakhstan; many schemes master's/PhD; some short courses for undergrads

opportunities.notes: HK locals cannot access KZ bilateral youth quotas.
opportunities.creative_angle: Calendar of JENESYS-type / Korean Embassy / Goethe / Alliance Française calls.
opportunities.name: Embassy Cultural / Bilateral Short Scholarships (via Kazakhstan)
opportunities.what_you_get: Short cultural, language, or youth STEM camps; airfare/stipend sometimes included
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Kazakhstan citizens; irregular calls via embassy channels

opportunities.notes: Career contract, not tourist travel hack. Internship track needs ~3 years work.
opportunities.creative_angle: Use for Master's in BME abroad later.
opportunities.name: Bolashak International Scholarship
opportunities.what_you_get: Full academic funding abroad + travel; mandatory return work 2–5 years
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Kazakh citizens; often work experience for Master's; Kazakh B1; unconditional offer

opportunities.notes: Wrong stage for mid-undergrad travel.
opportunities.creative_angle: Build travel/leadership CV now for this later.
opportunities.name: Schwarzman Scholars
opportunities.what_you_get: Fully funded 1-year Master's at Tsinghua + leadership programme
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Bachelor's degree; age usually ≤28; leadership

opportunities.name: Yenching Academy
opportunities.what_you_get: Fully funded Master's in China Studies at PKU
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Bachelor's; interdisciplinary China interest

opportunities.notes: Travel comes from HKU club funding, not conference scholarships.
opportunities.name: Harvard WorldMUN + Club Funding
opportunities.funder: WorldMUN fee aid + HKU MUN society
opportunities.what_you_get: Fee waivers possible; travel via university club fundraising
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Enrolled university students 18–25

opportunities.notes: Non-glamour sports often have emptier travel budgets with higher odds.
opportunities.creative_angle: Chess: contact Kazakhstan Chess Federation if rated.
opportunities.name: HKU / USFHK Sports Team Competition Travel
opportunities.what_you_get: Team travel to regional competitions
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Make the team; training commitment

opportunities.notes: Aga Khan ISP: Kazakhstan NOT eligible (Kyrgyz/Tajik yes).
opportunities.name: Islamic Development Bank Scholarships
opportunities.what_you_get: Tuition/living + economy return airfare for study tracks
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Kazakh citizens as IsDB member; may require home-country residence — verify booklet

opportunities.notes: Realistic for strong students with tailored emails.
opportunities.creative_angle: Cite a recent paper + 6–8 week availability + option to bring stipend.
opportunities.name: Self-arranged Lab Internships (Cold Email)
opportunities.what_you_get: Ad-hoc summer research; funding if PI covers or you bring ROA/HKU/Bolashak money
opportunities.eligibility_summary: No central programme; PI willingness + visa

opportunities.notes: Combine with DAAD KZ database.
opportunities.name: Max Planck Institute Internships
opportunities.what_you_get: Research stays; funding institute-dependent
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Often via IMPRS / ISI programmes or PI invitation

opportunities.notes: Stronger for computational BME.
opportunities.name: ETH Student Summer Research Fellowship
opportunities.what_you_get: Summer research fellowship (often CS/computational focus)
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Competitive; check current fields open to BME/computational

opportunities.notes: Real tourism ambassadors are established influencers. Legitimate programmes never charge fees or ask for crypto/gift cards.
opportunities.creative_angle: Ignore. Build real competition/research wins instead.
opportunities.name: Tourism Board / Airline 'Student Ambassador' DM Offers
opportunities.what_you_get: Usually nothing — or identity theft
opportunities.eligibility_summary: Anyone who falls for DMs
